title: Bigfoot's Backrooms
description: Adding new Backrooms related blocks to Minecraft
body:
# Bigfoot's Backrooms

**I wanted to make some Backrooms inspired builds but didn't just want to reskin exiting blocks, so I made new ones!**

All _non-light emmiting blocks_ are craftable using the various colors of **Terracotta** blocks in the _Stonecutter_.

The _light-emmiting blocks_ are craftable using **Froglights**, a **Sea Lantern** or a **Redstone Lamp** in a _Stonecutter_. Lights made with the _Ochre, Verdant and Pearlescent Froglights_ will always be on and have light level of 4, 8 and 12 while the _Sea Lantern_ will have a light level of 15. The **Redstone Lamp** will make a toggleable **Backrooms Redstone Lamp** that behaves like you'd expect.

A plain, non-color **Terracotta** in a _Stonecutter_ will craft a special fun block that's I'll leave you to discover. **You can configure the cooldown though!**

All blocks except the **Backrooms Redstone Lamp** and the _special block_ have _stairs_ and _slabs_.



Feel free to use this, put this in mod packs, whatever you want, I don't care. Would be pretty chill if you let me know so I could check it out, or even give me a shoutout, but this is not a requirement.
